context: 2005 in Bollywood was defined by the rise of Himesh Reshammiya's distinctive nasal pop style, with 'Aashiq Banaya Aapne' becoming a massive ringtone-era earworm. Atif Aslam crossed over from Pakistan with 'Woh Lamhe', while Bunty Aur Babli's 'Kajra Re' became one of the decade's most memorable dance numbers on MTV India and Channel V.

tracks.title: Kajra Re
tracks.artist: Alisha Chinai, Shankar Mahadevan & Javed Ali (from Bunty Aur Babli)

tracks.title: Dhadak Dhadak
tracks.artist: Udit Narayan & Mahalakshmi Iyer (from Bunty Aur Babli)

tracks.title: Nach Baliye
tracks.artist: Shankar Mahadevan & Sunidhi Chauhan (from Bunty Aur Babli)
